1.premise: LGBTQ+ is heard like ordering every burger topping and every anal option.
'Grindr' and 'grinder' sound alike, and grinders independently fit sandwich cravings.
Inviting someone to a Cowboys game reveals gayness more than oral sex does.

lines.text: -I got a confession to make, guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The first time I ever heard of LGBTQ+,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I thought it was like a fancy way of saying,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "I want everything on my burger."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Turns out it's a fancy way of saying,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "You love everything up your ass."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm from the East Coast, and I'm a foodie.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So the first time I heard of Grindr,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I thought it was an app for sandwiches.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Turns out it's for dicks.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So I came in the dude's mouth.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I was like, where's the sandwich?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: When does it show up?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm way hungrier and a lot more yay now.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, I really didn't know that guy was gay
lines.label: setup

lines.text: till about a week later.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He texted me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He was like, do you want to go to a Dallas Cowboys football
lines.label: setup

lines.text: game?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That was it.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That did a minute.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, that's been my time.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Thank you, guys.
lines.label: fluff
